summary: Retired legacy creator-matching routes (/creators, /recommendations) via 301 redirects to seller home. Bottom nav reduced to Trang chủ + Juli. Client-side LegacyRouteRedirect fallback preserves session. Auth and mode-select flows unchanged.

interfaceChanges.description: Removed Creators and Gợi ý tabs; seller home + Juli only.
Client-side redirect component for legacy routes.

mappings.criterion: Legacy creator-matching routes redirect to seller home or return 301 to /
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_legacy_creator_routes_retired.test.tsx::registers 301 redirects for /creators and /recommendations to seller home

mappings.criterion: Primary navigation no longer promotes creator-matching pages
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_legacy_creator_routes_retired.test.tsx::does not promote creator-matching pages in primary navigation

mappings.criterion: Existing auth and mode-select flows still work
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_mode_selection_gate.test.tsx::redirects to /mode-select after OTP when no workspace mode is saved

mappings.criterion: Integration test: /recommendations and /creators redirect without breaking session
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_legacy_creator_routes_retired.test.tsx::redirects legacy creator routes to seller home without clearing session

mappings.criterion: Integration test: seller home loads after redirect
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_legacy_creator_routes_retired.test.tsx::loads seller home shell after redirect target
